title: rosa sepium var. robusta
intro: Rosa sepium var. robusta is a variety of the Dog Rose plant, which is a flowering shrub native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa sepium var. robusta include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Rosa sepium var. robusta is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally or applied topically to the skin to harness its medicinal properties.
